scenarios.name: Build authenticated user CRUD with validation
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses r.Group("/api") with authMiddleware, ShouldBindJSON with binding tags (required,email,oneof), c.AbortWithStatusJSON for 401, and c.Set/c.Get for auth user per SKILL.md; baseline writes plausible Gin handlers but skips struct binding tags and the group+middleware composition pattern.

scenarios.name: Add graceful shutdown on SIGTERM
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses http.Server wrapping the gin.Engine, signal.Notify on SIGINT/SIGTERM, and srv.Shutdown with context.WithTimeout 5s exactly as documented, plus mentions GIN_MODE=release; baseline often calls r.Run and skips the http.Server.Shutdown timeout pattern.
